# spellCheckerDocumentTag

**Instance Property**

The spell-checker document tag for this document.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var spellCheckerDocumentTag: Int { get }
```

## Discussion

A tag identifying the receiver’s text as a document for the spell-checker server. See the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AppKit/NSSpellChecker] and NSSpellServer class specifications for more information on how this tag is used.

## Related Documentation

- **spellCheckerDocumentTag**: A tag identifying the text view’s text as a document for the spell checker server.

## Getting and Setting Document Editing Attributes

- **isEditable**: A Boolean that indicates whether the user is allowed to edit the document.
- **smartInsertDeleteEnabled**: A Boolean that indicates whether smart-space insertion and deletion is enabled.
- **isContinuousSpellCheckingEnabled**: A Boolean that indicates whether the web view has continuous spell-checking enabled.
- **undoManager**: The receiver’s undo manager.
- **editingDelegate**: The receiver’s editing delegate.
- **editableDOMRange(for:)**: Returns the editable DOM object located at a given point.
